case_title: JOHN MCGARY VS. DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $270.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,270.00, MARCH 2022, APRIL 2022 AND MAY 2022 RENTS. MATTER IS CONSOLIDATED WITH THE FOLLOWING CASES (CSM-22-865788, CSM-22-865789 AND CSM-22-865791 JOHN MCGARY VS DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP). JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN THE LEAD CASE CSM-22-865788. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDMENT MAILED TO DANIEL SHUPP-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/RTS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);SERVICE ALSO FOR SC-103, SC-109 SERVED JUL-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER
ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-22-865789, CSM-22-865791 WITH CASE CSM-22-865788 ALL FURTHER ENTRIES TO BE IN THE LEAD CASE OF CSM-22-865788.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JOHN MCGARY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LOUISA MENDOZA, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP IS NOT PRESENT. COURT ORDERS THAT RELATED CASES CSM-22-865788, CSM-22-865789 AND CSM-22-865791 JOHN MCGARY VS DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP BE CONSOLIDATED. THE LEAD CASE SHALL BE CSM-22-865788 JOHN MCGARY VS DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN THE LEAD CASE. ALL FURTHER ENTRIES ARE TO BE ENTERED INTO THIS LEAD CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES
